creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Closing since now feedback received for several months and lang/gcc 
(which is the canonical port of GCC) and lang/gcc46 are in sync now 
and both have seen a number of improvements. 

In a short while lang/gcc and USE_FORTRAN=yes will move to GCC 4.7, 
by the way. 

If you still see any problem, please advise.
